name: Banking Loan Eligibility
problem: Loan underwriting requires consistent rule application.
story: Prime applicant: 780 FICO, low DTI, stable employment.

data_sources.name: FFIEC underwriting guidelines
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

data_sources.name: FRED economic data (patterns)
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

rules: IF FicoScore(x, s) AND ScoreAbove720(s) AND DtiBelow36(x) AND EmploymentStable(x) THEN LoanApproved_Prime(x)
IF FicoScore(x, s) AND ScoreBelow620(s) THEN LoanDenied(x)
